hidden_state.goal: Understand why test suite execution time doubled over the past month
hidden_state.hidden_truth: The Puppeteer dependency was upgraded from v21 to v23 three weeks ago and the new version spins up a heavier browser instance per test

opening_input: our test suite used to run in 4 minutes, now it takes 8+. nothing obvious changed
behavioral_rules: Methodical and thorough. Will provide detailed git history when asked. Suspects a specific dependency upgrade but hasn't confirmed. Happy to dig into whatever the investigation needs.
